---
title: "Στοχαστικές διαδικασίες"
lang: el
format:
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    toc: true
    toc-title: "Περιεχόμενα"
    number-sections: true
    mainfont: "DejaVu Serif"
    sansfont: "DejaVu Sans"
    monofont: "DejaVu Sans Mono"
    fontsize: 11pt
    geometry: margin=2.5cm
    keep-tex: true
    babel-lang: "none"
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{polyglossia}
        \setmainlanguage{greek}
        \setotherlanguage{english}
        \usepackage{xcolor}
        \usepackage{fancyhdr}
        \usepackage{tcolorbox}
        \tcbuselibrary{theorems, skins, breakable}
        \usepackage{titlesec}
        \titleformat{\section}{\large\bfseries}{\thesection}{1em}{}
        \titleformat{\subsection}{\normalsize\bfseries}{\thesubsection}{1em}{}
        \titleformat{\subsubsection}{\normalsize\bfseries}{\thesubsubsection}{1em}{}
        \newcommand{\sectionbreak}{\clearpage}

        % --- Definition box ---
        \newtcbtheorem[number within=section]{definition}{Ορισμός}{
          enhanced,
          breakable,
          colback=white,
          colframe=black!70,
          fonttitle=\bfseries,
          separator sign={ ---},
          attach boxed title to top left={yshift=-2mm, xshift=4mm},
          boxed title style={colback=black!70, coltext=white}
        }{def}

        % --- Theorem box ---
        \newtcbtheorem[number within=section]{theorem}{Θεώρημα}{
          enhanced,
          breakable,
          colback=white,
          colframe=black!40,
          boxrule=0.8pt,
          fonttitle=\bfseries,
          separator sign={ ---},
          attach boxed title to top left={yshift=-2mm, xshift=4mm},
          boxed title style={colback=black!40, coltext=white}
        }{thm}
---

{{< include chapter-01.qmd >}}
{{< include chapter-02.qmd >}}
